nodes.name: Detection
nodes.description: 3D detection building blocks from the DSB2017 1st-place solution for pulmonary nodule detection

nodes.name: lung_mask_with_bone_removal
nodes.description: Segment lungs from a CT volume by per-slice Gaussian thresholding, 3D connected component filtering, hole filling, and left/right separation via erosion and distance transforms
nodes.type_signature: (ct_volume: NDArray[np.float64], spacing: NDArray[np.float64], intensity_th: float = -600.0, pad_value: float = 170.0) -> NDArray[np.float64]

nodes.name: anchor_label_mapping_with_iou_dilation
nodes.description: Map ground-truth targets to anchor-grid labels via 3D IoU with dilation-based ignore zones between positive and negative regions
nodes.type_signature: (input_size: tuple[int, int, int], target: NDArray[np.float64], anchors: NDArray[np.float64], stride: int, pos_th: float = 0.5, neg_th: float = 0.02, dilation_iterations: int = 1) -> NDArray[np.float64]

nodes.name: center_feature_extraction_3d
nodes.description: Extract center 2x2x2 spatial region from a 5D feature map and max-pool to (N, C)

nodes.name: coordinate_aware_3d_unet
nodes.description: 3D U-Net with coordinate injection for anchor-based nodule detection. Encoder uses PostRes blocks with channels [24,32,64,64,64] and 4 max-pool stages (stride 2). Decoder has two transposed-convolution upsample paths with channels [128,64,64]. A 3-channel normalized coordinate grid is concatenated at the back2 decoder stage, providing explicit spatial awareness. Output head produces 5 values per anchor (objectness + 4 regression targets) for anchors at [10, 30, 60] mm.
